LanguageData.VFES_ChemfuelToChemshine.label: ferment chemfuel into chemshine
LanguageData.VCE_FineSoupRecipe.description: Turns an uncooked fine soup into 10 cooked fine soups.
LanguageData.VCE_FineSoupRecipe.label: cook fine soup
LanguageData.VCE_GourmetSoupRecipe.description: Turns an uncooked gourmet soup into 10 cooked gourmet soups.
LanguageData.VCE_GourmetSoupRecipe.label: cook gourmet soup
LanguageData.VCE_JellyIntoCheese.label: insect jelly into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_LavishSoupRecipe.description: Turns an uncooked lavish soup into 10 cooked lavish soups.
LanguageData.VCE_LavishSoupRecipe.label: cook lavish soup
LanguageData.VCE_MilkIntoCheese.label: milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleSoupRecipe.description: Turns an uncooked simple soup into 10 cooked simple soups.
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleSoupRecipe.label: cook simple soup
LanguageData.VCE_BlueMilkIntoCheese.label: blue milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_GowMilkIntoCheese.label: gow milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_NightMilkIntoCheese.label: night milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_BeeMilkIntoCheese.label: bee milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_BearffaloMilkIntoCheese.label: bearffalo milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_ChickenffaloMilkIntoCheese.label: chickenffalo milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_MechaMilkIntoCheese.label: mecha milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_MuffalobearMilkIntoCheese.label: muffalobear milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_MuffalochickenMilkIntoCheese.label: muffalochicken milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_RatMilkIntoCheese.label: rat milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_ThrumffaloMilkIntoCheese.label: thrumffalo milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_WeirdMilkIntoCheese.label: weird milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_WolffaloMilkIntoCheese.label: wolffalo milk into cheese
LanguageData.VCE_FineStewRecipe.description: Turns an uncooked fine stew into 10 cooked fine stews.
LanguageData.VCE_FineStewRecipe.label: cook fine stew
LanguageData.VCE_LavishStewRecipe.description: Turns an uncooked lavish stew into 10 cooked lavish stews.
LanguageData.VCE_LavishStewRecipe.label: cook lavish stew
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleStewRecipe.description: Turns an uncooked simple stew into 10 cooked simple stews.
LanguageData.VCE_SimpleStewRecipe.label: cook simple stew
LanguageData.VCE_SoybeansToSauce.label: ferment soybeans into soy sauce
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyMustToAmbrandy.label: ferment ambrandy must into ambrandy
LanguageData.VBE_GinMushToGin.label: ferment gin mush into gin
LanguageData.VBE_SyrupToSoda.label: turn syrup into soda
LanguageData.VBE_TequilaMustToTequila.label: ferment tequila must into tequila
LanguageData.VBE_VodkaMashToVodka.label: ferment vodka mash into vodka
LanguageData.VBE_WhiskeyMashToWhiskey.label: ferment whiskey mash into whiskey
LanguageData.VBE_WhiskeyToDoubleWhiskey.label: ferment whiskey into double whiskey
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_SplitStabilizedAlloypack.des: Turns 1 stabilized alloypack into 1 Plasteel, 1 Gold and 2 Steel.
LanguageData.VRecyclingE_TrashToBricks.label: trash to trashbricks
LanguageData.VFEM2_GrapeToAwfulWine.label: ferment grape must into wine (awful)
LanguageData.VFEM2_GrapeToExcellentWine.label: ferment grape must into wine (excellent)
LanguageData.VFEM2_GrapeToGoodWine.label: ferment grape must into wine (good)
LanguageData.VFEM2_GrapeToLegendaryWine.label: ferment grape must into wine (legendary)
LanguageData.VFEM2_GrapeToMasterworkWine.label: ferment grape must into wine (masterwork)
LanguageData.VFEM2_GrapeToNormalWine.label: ferment grape must into wine (normal)
LanguageData.VFEM2_GrapeToPoorWine.label: ferment grape must into wine (poor)
LanguageData.VFEM2_HoneyToMead.label: ferment honey into mead
LanguageData.VFEM2_PatchLeatherToHardleather.descript: Turns 100 patch leather into 100 hard leather.
LanguageData.VFEM2_PatchLeatherToHardleather.label: boil patch leather into hard leather
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyBronze.description: Use intense heat to smelt and combine steel with minerals from a stone chunk to forge bronze alloy.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyBronze.label: alloy bronze from steel and stone chunks
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyGravlite.description: Use intense heat to combine plasteel and vacstone, forging the ultra-light gravlite alloy.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyGravlite.label: alloy gravlite from vacstone and plasteel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyPlasteel.description: Use high heat and pressure to alloy steel, chemfuel, and gold into pure plasteel.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyPlasteel.label: alloy plasteel from steel, chemfuel and gold
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloySkySteel.description: Use intense heat to smelt and combine steel with blue gel to forge sky steel.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloySkySteel.label: alloy sky steel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyStainlessSteel.descripti: Use intense heat to smelt and combine steel with uranium impurities to forge stainless steel.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AlloyStainlessSteel.label: alloy stainless steel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CreateObsidian.description: Use extreme heat and rapid cooling processes to transform unrefined stone chunks into obsidian.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CreateObsidian.label: create obsidian from stone chunks
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedEggs.description: Safely store boiled eggs in a steel can. Canning food extends its shelf life almost indefinitely. 20 cans will be produced per every nutrition consumed, so for example 4 chicken eggs and one steel will output 20 cans.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedEggs.label: make canned eggs
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedFish.description: Safely store fish in a steel can. Canning food extends its shelf life almost indefinitely. 20 cans will be produced per every nutrition consumed, so for example 4 salmon and one steel will output 20 cans.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedFish.label: make canned fish
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedFruit.description: Safely store fruit in a steel can. Canning food extends its shelf life almost indefinitely. Preserved fruit can be used in the production of desserts. 20 cans will be produced per every nutrition consumed, so for example 20 apples plus one steel will output 20 cans.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedFruit.label: make canned fruit
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedMeat.description: Safely store raw meat in a steel can. Canning extends its shelf life almost indefinitely. 20 cans will be produced per every nutrition consumed, so 20 meat plus one steel will output 20 cans.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedMeat.label: make canned meat
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedProduce.description: Safely store vegetables in a steel can. Canning food extends its shelf life almost indefinitely. 20 cans will be produced per every nutrition consumed, so for example 20 corn plus one steel will output 20 cans.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedProduce.label: make canned produce
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedSoup.description: Safely store pre-cooked soup in steel cans. Canning food extends its shelf life almost indefinitely. Canned soup does not carry the benefits of being fine or lavish.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCannedSoup.label: make canned soup
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakePatchleather.description: Make patchleather out of leather inserted.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakePatchleather.label: make patchleather
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSynthread.description: Weave synthread from cloth and synthetic fibers.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSynthread.label: make synthread
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeArmorPiercingShells.descr: Combine steel and chemfuel to create armor-piercing shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeArmorPiercingShells.label: make armor-piercing shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeClusterShells.description: Combine steel and chemfuel to create cluster shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeClusterShells.label: make cluster shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeDeadlifeShells.descriptio: Use bioferrite to create deadlife shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeDeadlifeShells.label: make deadlife shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeEMPShells.description: Combine steel and components to create EMP shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeEMPShells.label: make EMP shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeFirefoamShells.descriptio: Use steel to create firefoam shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeFirefoamShells.label: make firefoam shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeHighExplosiveShells.descr: Combine steel and chemfuel to create high-explosive shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeHighExplosiveShells.label: make high-explosive shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeIncendiaryShells.descript: Combine steel and chemfuel to create incendiary shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeIncendiaryShells.label: make incendiary shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeShrapnelShells.descriptio: Use steel to create shrapnel shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeShrapnelShells.label: make shrapnel shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSmokeShells.description: Use steel to create smoke shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSmokeShells.label: make smoke shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeTarShells.description: Combine steel and asphalt to create tar shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeTarShells.label: make tar shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeToxShells.description: Combine steel and chemfuel to create tox shells.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeToxShells.label: make tox shells
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AssembleComponent.label: make a component
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BlueGel_To_Hexagel.descriptio: Make a crystallized cube of hexagel by compressing blue gel under high pressure.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BlueGel_To_Hexagel.label: compress blue gel into hexagel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_Make_HexagelCore.description: Craft hexagel cores using hexagel and uranium as a stabilizer.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_Make_HexagelCore.label: make hexagel cores
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RefineUraniumCrystals.descrip: Extract useful materials from unrefined uranium crystals.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RefineUraniumCrystals.label: refine uranium crystals
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AstrofuelFromChemfuel.descrip: Make a batch of high-grade astrofuel by refining chemfuel.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_AstrofuelFromChemfuel.label: make astrofuel from chemfuel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromCanola.descri: Make a batch of chemfuel by extracting biofuel from canola flowers.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromCanola.label: make chemfuel from canola
Make a batch of chemfuel by extracting and condensing gas from mushroom stalks.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromOrganics.desc: Make a batch of chemfuel by extracting biofuel from organic feedstocks. Process will consume 30 food items and output 1 chemfuel per each 0.1 nutrition consumed. For example, 30 potatoes will produce 15 chemfuel, while 30 simple meals (0.9 nutrition) will produce 270 chemfuel.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromRedWood.descr: Make a batch of chemfuel by extracting and condensing wood gas from red wood logs.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromRedWood.label: make 25 chemfuel from 50 red wood logs
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromWood.descript: Make a batch of chemfuel by extracting and condensing wood gas from logs.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChemfuelFromWood.label: make chemfuel from wood
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnApparel.description: Burn unwanted apparel to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnApparel.label: burn apparel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnDrug.description: Burn unwanted drugs to completely destroy them.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnDrug.label: burn drugs
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnWeapon.description: Burn unwanted weapon to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BurnWeapon.label: burn weapon
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateAnimal.description: Cremate an animal corpse to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateAnimal.label: cremate animal
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateEntities.description: Cremate an entity's corpse to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateEntities.label: cremate entity
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHumanlike.description: Cremate a human corpse to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHumanlike.label: cremate human
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHumanoidHybrids.descri: Cremate a humanoid hybrid's corpse to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHumanoidHybrids.label: cremate humanoid hybrid
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHybrids.description: Cremate a paragon or hybrid's corpse to completely destroy it.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_CremateHybrids.label: cremate paragon or hybrid
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeBeerFromHops.description: Rapidly mash hops into wort, and then ferment into beer using automated processes.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeBeerFromHops.label: make batch of beer from hops
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChocoLiquor.description: Ferment chocolate into chocolate liquor using automated processes.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeChocoLiquor.label: make batch of chocolate liquor
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCoffeeLiquor.description: Ferment coffee into coffee liquor using automated processes.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeCoffeeLiquor.label: make batch of coffee liquor
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeGinFromBerries.descriptio: Rapidly mash raw berries into gin mush, and then ferment into gin using automated processes.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeGinFromBerries.label: make batch of gin from raw berries
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSakeFromRice.description: Rapidly mash raw rice and then ferment into sake using automated processes.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSakeFromRice.label: make batch of sake from raw rice
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSoda.description: Make soda syrup by mixing natural fruit juice with high fructose corn syrup and turn it into soda.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSoda.label: make batch of soda from juice and corn
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeTequilaFromAgave.descript: Rapidly mash agave into tequila must, and then ferment into tequila using automated processes.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeTequilaFromAgave.label: make batch of tequila from agave
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeVodkaFromPotatoes.descrip: Rapidly mash potatoes into vodka mash, and then ferment into vodka using automated processes.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeVodkaFromPotatoes.label: make batch of vodka from potatoes
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeWhiskeyFromCorn.descripti: Rapidly ferment corn into whisky mash, and then ferment into whisky using automated processes.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeWhiskeyFromCorn.label: make batch of whisky from corn
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForCragstoneChunk.descript: Dig to harvest a cragstone chunk.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForCragstoneChunk.label: dig to harvest a cragstone chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForGraniteChunk.descriptio: Dig to harvest a granite chunk.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForGraniteChunk.label: dig to harvest a granite chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForLimestoneChunk.descript: Dig to harvest a limestone chunk.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForLimestoneChunk.label: dig to harvest a limestone chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForMarbleChunk.description: Dig to harvest a marble chunk.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForMarbleChunk.label: dig to harvest a marble chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForMetals.description: Dig for random metals. Type of metal extracted depends on the deep commonality of the resource. The amount depends on the usual yield of such a deposit.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForMetals.label: dig for metals
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForMudstoneChunk.descripti: Dig to harvest a mudstone chunk.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForMudstoneChunk.label: dig to harvest a mudstone chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForOnyxglassChunk.descript: Dig to harvest an onyxglass chunk.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForOnyxglassChunk.label: dig to harvest an onyxglass chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForRoseQuartzChunk.descrip: Dig to harvest a rose quartz chunk.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForRoseQuartzChunk.label: dig to harvest a rose quartz chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForSandstoneChunk.descript: Dig to harvest a sandstone chunk.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForSandstoneChunk.label: dig to harvest a sandstone chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForSlateChunk.description: Dig to harvest a slate chunk.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForSlateChunk.label: dig to harvest a slate chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForSlimeStoneChunk.descrip: Dig to harvest a hardened slime chunk.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_DigForSlimeStoneChunk.label: dig to harvest a hardened slime chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_ShredDrone.description: Use various built-in tools and grinders to shred a drone into steel. 10 steel will be extracted per 1 body size of the drone.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_ShredDrone.label: shred drone
LanguageData.VFEFactory_ShredMechanoid.description: Use various built-in tools and grinders to shred a mechanoid into steel. 10 steel will be extracted per 1 body size of the mechanoid.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_ShredMechanoid.label: shred mechanoid
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeStoneBlocks.description: Cut rock chunks into usable stone blocks.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeStoneBlocks.label: cut 20 blocks from a stone chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MinceCorpses.description: Chop corpses into raw, edible minced meat suitable for cooking or further processing.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MinceCorpses.label: mince corpses
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MinceEntityCorpses.descriptio: Chop entity corpses into twisted meat.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MinceEntityCorpses.label: mince entity corpses
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MinceHumanCorpses.description: Chop human corpses into raw human meat. This may anger colonists, depending on their ideological beliefs. Equipment will all be discarded.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MinceHumanCorpses.label: mince human corpses
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MinceHumanoidHybridCorpses.de: Chop humanoid hybrid corpses into raw human meat. This may anger colonists, depending on their ideological beliefs.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MinceHybridCorpses.descriptio: Chop hybrid corpses into raw, edible minced meat suitable for cooking or further processing.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MinceHybridCorpses.label: mince hybrid corpses
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MinceInsectoidCorpses.descrip: Chop insectoid corpses into raw insect meat.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MinceInsectoidCorpses.label: mince insectoid corpses
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltApparel.description: Use heat and strong electromagnets to break down apparel into useful resources. This operation will output 25% of the materials used to craft the apparel, excluding any components or advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltApparel.label: smelt apparel
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMechanoid.description: Use extreme heat to extract steel from mechanoid corpses. 10 steel will be extracted per 1 body size of the mechanoid.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMechanoid.label: smelt steel from mechanoid
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromChunk.descripti: Use heat and strong electromagnets to extract useful metal from stone chunks.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromChunk.label: extract metal from stone chunk
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromMechSlag.descri: Use heat and strong electromagnets to extract useful metal from mechanoid slag chunks.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromMechSlag.label: smelt metal from mechanoid slag
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromSlag.descriptio: Use heat and strong electromagnets to extract useful metal from slag chunks.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltMetalFromSlag.label: smelt metal from slag
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltWeapon.description: Use heat and strong electromagnets to break down weapons into useful resources. This operation will output 25% of the materials used to craft the weapon, excluding any components or advanced components.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SmeltWeapon.label: smelt weapons
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeBabyFood.description: Make baby food, a nutritionally balanced vegetarian mash for babies. While easy to make in large quantities, only babies appreciate its bland taste and mushy texture.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeBabyFood.label: make baby food
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeKibble.description: Make animal kibble by combining raw meat and plants. 24 kibble will be produced per every nutrition consumed, so 15 vegetable and 15 meat will output 36 kibble.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeKibble.label: make kibble
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeKibbleFromHay.description: Make animal kibble by combining raw meat and hay. Will always output 36 kibble.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeKibbleFromHay.label: make kibble from hay
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeMassProducedMeal.descript: Cook straightforward, mass-produced meals from a combination of meat and plant ingredients. A total of 2 nutrition will make 4 mass-produced meals.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeMassProducedMeal.label: make mass-produced meals
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakePemmican.description: Make pemmican, a preserved combination of meat and plant food. It doesn't taste amazing, but lasts a long time without refrigeration. 32 pemmican will be produced per every nutrition consumed, so 5 vegetable and 5 meat will output 16 pemmican.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakePemmican.label: make pemmican
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakePumpkinCoffee.description: Make pumpkin spice coffee, a cheap, mass produced generic coffee seeped in an array of spices, oddly excluding any actual pumpkin..
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakePumpkinCoffee.label: make pumpkin spice coffee
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSimpleSoup.description: Prepare a simple uncooked soup quickly made from a few ingredients.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSimpleSoup.label: prepare simple soup
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSurvivalMeal.description: Prepare packaged survival meals from a combination of meat and plant ingredients. Much of the ingredients are wasted in the preservation process. A total of 2.4 nutrition will make 4 survival meals.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeSurvivalMeal.label: make survival meal
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BrewPsychiteTea.description: Brew a batch of psychite tea from psychoid leaves.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_BrewPsychiteTea.label: brew a batch of psychite tea
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeMedicine.description: Make a batch of medicine from cloth, herbal medicine and neutroamine.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_MakeMedicine.label: make batch of medicine
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RollCigar.description: Roll tobacco and gold into a cigar.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RollCigar.label: roll cigar
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RollCigarettes.label: roll cigarettes
LanguageData.VFEFactory_RollJoint.label: roll smokeleaf joints
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeAgePills.descriptio: Synthesize a batch of antibiotics from psychoid leaves and herbal medicine.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeAgePills.label: synthesize age pills
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeAntibiotics.descrip: Synthesize a batch of antibiotics from psychoid leaves and herbal medicine.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeAntibiotics.label: synthesize a batch of antibiotics
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeFlake.description: Synthesize a batch of flake from psychoid leaves.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeFlake.label: synthesize a batch of flake
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeGoJuice.description: Synthesize a batch of go-juice from neutroamine and yayo.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeGoJuice.label: synthesize a batch of go-juice
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizePenoxycyline.label: synthesize penoxycyline
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeWakeUp.description: Synthesize a batch of wake-up from neutroamine.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeWakeUp.label: synthesize a batch of wake-up
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeYayo.description: Synthesize a batch of yayo from psychoid leaves.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeYayo.label: synthesize a batch of yayo
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeNeutroamine.descrip: Synthesize neutroamine from chemfuel and rendered animal fat.
LanguageData.VFEFactory_SynthesizeNeutroamine.label: synthesize neutroamine
